nasb.text: It is a trustworthy statement: For if we died with Him, we will also live with Him;

esv.text: The saying is trustworthy, for: If we have died with him, we will also live with him;

cnv.text: “我們若與基督同死，就必與他同活；

ccb.text: 有真实可信的话说： “我们若与基督同死， 就必与祂同活。

csbs.text: 以下的话是信实的： 我们如果与基督一同死了，就将与他一同活着；
